title: blepharipappus douglasii
intro: Blepharipappus douglasii, also known as Douglas' scales or Douglas' hairy goldenweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Blepharipappus douglasii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal and topical applications.
